meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish Your First SaaS App
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to finish your first student SaaS app and build your portfolio.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'tutorial hell' by providing a production-ready scaffolding that handles authentication, database setup, and deployment workflows. By pairing this with Claude Code, you offload the boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-impact logic and shipping your first real-world application to your portfolio.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial excitement of a new idea fades into a graveyard of half-finished repositories and broken local environments. The 'can't finish projects' cycle isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of structure. You are getting bogged down in configuration when you should be building features that define your career.

Today, we break the cycle. We are moving beyond the endless tutorials and into the realm of professional execution. By leveraging the Antigravity project template alongside Claude Code, you gain an unfair advantage—a high-velocity scaffold that turns your raw idea into a deployable reality before your motivation wanes.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Stop building from scratch. Initialize the base template to get your folder structure and environment variables ready for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard SaaS template with Next.js and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Your Core Domain Model
steps.description: Use Claude to define your database schema. This keeps your data layer consistent and prevents scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a task-management app with users, projects, and tasks tables using the Antigravity schema pattern.

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flows
steps.description: Auth is a common blocker. Use the template's built-in auth provider to secure your app in minutes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity auth module to handle login, sign-up, and protected route redirection.

steps.title: Build the Feature Logic
steps.description: Focus on the unique value proposition of your project while the template handles the boilerplate UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD interface for tasks using the existing Antigravity UI component library.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: The final milestone. Use the template's CI/CD pipeline to push your project live to Vercel or your preferred host.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for the current project using the standard Antigravity CI/CD workflow.

pro_tips: Always commit after every successful feature implementation to maintain a visible 'green' contribution graph.
Use Claude Code's 'review' flag on your PRs to catch security vulnerabilities before they hit your main branch.
Limit your MVP scope to exactly three core features; anything else is a distraction that kills project momentum.
Keep your environment variables strictly in .env.local to avoid leaking secrets, a classic mistake for beginners.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' mode during development to see UI changes instantly, keeping your feedback loop tight.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, document the challenges you overcame in a README file. This acts as a case study for your portfolio and proves your ability to ship.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop dreaming and start shipping. Every great engineer started exactly where you are, but the ones who succeed are the ones who finish what they start. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
